Metadata.title: Epay: Premium Global Payment Gateway
Metadata.description: Premium global payment infrastructure for digital businesses. Fast, secure, API-first, and globally scalable.

Footer.brandDescription: Premium financial infrastructure powering the global digital economy. Built for speed, security, and scale.

Hero.description: empowers Gaming & digital entertainment with instantaneous {d0} settlement, smart routing, and robust fraud prevention.

Capabilities.title: Your financial universe on one platform
Capabilities.description: Software and APIs to manage everything from high-risk processing, instant payouts, and multi-currency settlement.

routing.title: Intelligent Routing
routing.description: Automatically route transactions through the highest performing channels to maximize acceptance rates.
routing.analyticsDescription: Monitor transaction volume, success rates, and settlement status across all currencies in real-time.

settlement.title: Flexible Settlement
settlement.description: Support D0 flexible settlement options to ensure funds are available when you need them.
settlement.efficiencyDescription: Accelerate capital turnover and improve operational liquidity with rapid funds recycling.

risk.title: Fraud Prevention
risk.description: Big data real-time anti-fraud system effectively intercepts malicious complaints and brushing activities.
risk.securityDescription: Protect merchant accounts from unauthorized access and ensure transaction integrity.

channel.title: Global Coverage
channel.description: Covering USDT and overseas local payment methods to meet the needs of global users.
channel.userHabitsDescription: Satisfy local payment preferences to boost conversion rates and user trust.

Solutions.title: Solutions for Gaming & Live Streaming
Solutions.description: Purpose-built infrastructure for high-velocity micropayments and instant global compliant payouts.
Solutions.gamingDescription: High-concurrency infrastructure optimized for large deposits and anti-fraud. Built specifically for mobile, web, and card game platforms.
Solutions.gamingLargeDepositsDesc: Higher approval rates for high-ticket transactions through intelligent acquiring bank matching.
Solutions.gamingHighConcurrencyDesc: Architecture designed to handle massive spikes during peak sporting events and tournaments.
Solutions.gamingAntiFraudDesc: Real-time risk scoring specifically tuned for gambling compliance and bonus abuse prevention.
Solutions.streamingDescription: Monetize global audiences with instant tipping and virtual gifts. Optimized for real-time creator payouts and high-frequency micro-transactions.
Solutions.streamingMicroPaymentsDesc: Optimized fee structures for small, frequent payments, ensuring profitability on every tip.
Solutions.streamingVirtualGiftsDesc: Keep creators motivated with immediate access to their earnings through our liquidity network.
Solutions.streamingCreatorPayoutsDesc: Unified payment experience across iOS, Android, and Web platforms with a single integration.

Channels.title: Payment Channels
Channels.globalFiatDesc: Global Fiat Acquiring with settlement in USDT.
Channels.globalUsdtDesc: USDT Acquiring with settlement in USDT.

t1.quote: We integrated Epay to handle cross-border settlements across 4 continents. Their API stability under high load is impressive—zero downtime during our peak traffic events.
t1.name: David Vance

t2.quote: The regional compliance architecture provided by Epay simplified our expansion. Their localized support teams actually understand the nuances of the Latin American markets we operate in.
t2.name: Helena Rossi

t3.quote: Technical integration took less than one day. The documentation is clear and the support from their engineering team is exceptional. Definitely a tier-1 payment infrastructure.
t3.name: Julian Mercer

About.desc1: Epay stands as the definitive financial bridge for Southeast Asia, architecting high-performance liquidation rails that connect local fiat markets to the global economy.
About.desc2: With over 10 million daily volume, we've moved beyond simple processing to become the core infrastructure for digital entertainment, cross-border trade, and real-time liquidity.

cta.title: Join the Future of Global Commerce
cta.description: Partner with the infrastructure built for the next generation of digital value exchange.

m1.title: Singapore Inception
m1.desc: Foundation in Singapore. Initially established as a collection bridge for digital platforms seeking more efficient regional payment methods.

m2.title: Regional Footprint
m2.desc: Expanded local presence into Malaysia and Thailand. Built direct partnerships with indigenous networks to simplify cross-border transactions.

m3.title: Deep Connectivity
m3.desc: Strengthened infrastructure in Indonesia and Vietnam, providing transparent and accessible liquidity rails for merchants across the region.

m4.title: Market Integration
m4.desc: Successfully bridged Southeast Asian fiat markets with the global digital asset ecosystem, supporting enterprise scale and compliance.

Contact.title: Connect with our Infrastructure Experts
Contact.description: Direct consultation and technical integration assistance via Telegram.
Contact.salesDesc: Discuss high-volume processing, custom integration, and partnership opportunities.
Contact.techDesc: API integration assistance, bug reporting, and merchant dashboard support.
Contact.verification: Please verify the exact username to avoid impersonators.

steps.step1Desc: Create your profile instantly with zero paperwork required.
steps.step2Desc: Generate keys for production and sandbox environments.
steps.step3Desc: Connect via REST API or use our optimized libraries.
steps.step4Desc: Go live immediately with real-time monitoring enabled.

features.webhooksDesc: Debug events as they happen. Inspect payloads and verify signatures directly from the portal.
features.sandboxDesc: Risk-free testing environment identical to production.
features.sdkDesc: Idiomatic libraries for your favorite language.

support.title: Stuck? Ask the core team.
support.description: Get direct access to our engineers and product managers on our dedicated technical Telegram channel.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: EPay Inc. is committed to protecting your privacy and pledges to handle your personal information in accordance with applicable laws, regulations and other relevant privacy laws and regulatory requirements. This data protection details how we collect, use, store, share, and protect your information.
privacy.contactIntro: For any questions related to data protection, please contact us at:

s1.title: 1. Personal Information We Collect
s1.desc: The information we collect is categorized as follows in order to provide services, ensure compliance, and meet regulatory requirements.

s11.title: 1.1 Personal Identifiable Information (PII)
s11.desc: Personal Identifiable Information (PII) includes any information that can directly or indirectly identify you. In compliance with applicable laws, regulations and other relevant privacy laws and regulatory requirements, we may collect the following information:

items.name: Full Name: Used for registration, account verification, and identity confirmation.
items.ssn: Social Security Number (SSN) or other government-issued ID: Used for identity verification and fraud prevention.
items.address: Address: Including residential and mailing addresses for identity verification, document sending, or customer support.
items.dob: Date of Birth: Used for identity verification and to ensure the user meets the minimum age requirement.
items.email: Email Address: Used to contact you, send notifications, and confirm information.
items.phone: Phone Number: Used for account verification, two-factor authentication (2FA), and customer support.

items.bank: Bank Account Details: Including account number, routing number, and account type, used for processing bank transfers and other payment services.
items.card: Credit or Debit Card Information: Including card number, expiration date, and CVV code, used for online payments and financial transactions.
items.records: Transaction Records: We retain all financial transaction records related to you, including amounts sent and received, dates, counterparty information, and other relevant financial records.

items.ip: IP Address: Used to identify your device and location to ensure security and prevent fraud.
items.device: Device Identifier: We may collect unique identifiers of the device you use to access our services, such as the IMEI or device ID of your phone.
items.os: Operating System, Browser Type and Version: Used to ensure compatibility and provide personalized services.
items.cookies: Cookies and Similar Technologies: Used to help optimize website performance, track user behavior, and improve user experience.

s2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
s2.desc: We use your personal information for the following purposes to ensure compliance with legal requirements and provide you with the best services:

s21.title: 2.1 Compliance with Legal, Regulatory, and Compliance Requirements
s21.desc: Under applicable laws and regulations, we are required to collect, store, and process certain personal information to fulfill the following obligations:
items: Comply with Anti-Money Laundering (AML), Countering the Financing of Terrorism (CFT), and other financial regulatory laws.
Verify customer identities and perform Know Your Customer (KYC) requirements.
Submit Suspicious Activity Reports (SAR) and Currency Transaction Reports (CTR) to the regulatory agencies.
Prevent illegal activities, such as fraud, terrorism financing, and money laundering.

items.processing: Transaction Processing: Assist you in financial transactions, including transfers, payments, withdrawals, etc.
items.support: Customer Support: Resolve your issues, handle inquiries, and provide assistance.
items.personal: Personalized Services: Customize your experience based on your usage and preferences.

s3.title: 3. Sharing and Disclosure of Information
s3.desc: We will only share your personal information when legally permitted and take measures to ensure your privacy is protected.

s31.title: 3.1 Legal Requirements
items: Under applicable laws and regulations, we are obligated to report suspicious activities to government agencies and law enforcement.
In compliance with court orders, subpoenas, or other legal processes, we may provide your information.

s32.title: 3.2 Third-Party Service Providers
s32.desc: We may share your information with third parties who assist us in providing services, such as Payment Processors, Identity Verification Providers, and Technical Support Providers.

s41.title: 4.1 Data Security
s41.desc: To protect your personal information, we have implemented multi-layer security measures, including Encryption (TLS/SSL), Access Control, and Network Security Measures (firewalls, etc.).

s42.title: 4.2 Data Retention
s42.desc: We will retain your information as required by laws and regulations. For example, applicable laws and regulations require us to retain certain customer information and transaction records for at least 5 years.

s5.title: 5. Your Rights
s5.desc: You have the following rights regarding your personal data:
items: Right to Access: Request access to the information we hold about you.
Right to Rectification: Request correction of inaccurate information.
Right to Erasure: Request deletion of your information under certain circumstances.
Right to Object: Object to or restrict our processing of your information.
Right to Data Portability: Request transfer of your information to other service providers.

s6.title: 6. Children's Privacy
s6.desc: Our services are not intended for children under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 18. If we discover that we have collected such information, we will immediately delete it.

s7.title: 7. International Data Transfers
s7.desc: In some cases your personal information may be transferred to other countries. We will ensure that such cross-border data transfers comply with applicable privacy laws and take appropriate protective measures.

s8.title: 8. Changes to the data protection
s8.desc: We reserve the right to modify this data protection at any time. If there are significant changes, we will notify you via email or in-service notifications. Continued use of our services constitutes your acceptance of these changes.

s9.title: 9. Contact Us
s9.desc: If you have any questions, complaints, or wish to exercise your rights under this data protection, please contact us at:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: EPay Inc. and its subsidiaries require all users of our internet websites (collectively referred to as 'the Website') to comply with the following terms and conditions. By accessing this Website, you acknowledge and accept these terms and conditions. Carefully read all terms and conditions below.

s1.title: 1. Regulations
s1.desc: Users' access to and use of this Website are subject to all applicable international, federal, state/provincial, and local laws and regulations governing both EPay Inc. as the website host and users' original jurisdictions.

s2.title: 2. Ownership and Copyright
s2.desc: All information, content, reports, data, graphics, interfaces, web pages, text, files, software, product names, company names, trademarks, logos, and trade names (collectively 'Content') contained on this Website, including the manner in which Content is presented or appears and all related information, are the property of their respective owners (as indicated), EPAY INC or its licensors, as applicable.

s3.title: 3. No Warranties
s3.desc1: All Content on this Website is provided to you 'AS IS' without any express or implied warranties of any kind, including but not limited to implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, title, non-infringement, security, or accuracy. This Website and its Content shall not be construed as an offer to sell any product or service.
s3.desc2: EPay Inc. does not endorse and is not responsible for the accuracy or reliability of any opinions, advice, or statements made by any party other than EPay Inc. through this Website, except as required by applicable law. In no event shall EPay Inc. be liable for any loss or damage arising from users' reliance on information obtained through this Website.

s4.title: 4. Limitation of Liability
s4.desc1: In no event shall EPay Inc., its affiliates, agents, licensors, suppliers, or their respective directors, officers, or employees be liable for any special, indirect, incidental, punitive, exemplary, economic, or consequential damages arising from any cause whatsoever, including but not limited to loss of use, loss of profits, or loss of savings, even if EPay Inc. or any of its lawful agents or employees have been advised of the possibility of such damages or claim.
s4.desc2: The aggregate total liability of EPay Inc., its affiliates, agents, licensors, suppliers, and their respective directors, officers, and employees for any reason (including but not limited to breach of contract, tort, negligence, or otherwise) shall not exceed two hundred U.S. dollars.

s5.title: 5. Confidentiality of User Communications
s5.desc: Subject to legal requirements and EPay Inc.'s Privacy Statement, EPay Inc. will maintain the confidentiality of all user communications containing personal user information transmitted directly to EPay Inc. User posts on message boards or chat rooms are not confidential.

s6.title: 6. Linked Internet Websites
s6.desc: Caching, hypertext linking to the Website via pop-ups, and framing of any Content provided through the Website are strictly prohibited without written authorization. EPay Inc. reserves the right to disable unauthorized links/frames and expressly disclaims responsibility for content on any other internet websites linked to this Website. Accessing third-party websites linked to this Website is at users' own risk.

s7.title: 7. Third-Party Website Links
s7.desc: This Website may contain links to other websites ('Third-Party Websites') owned/operated by third parties, not maintained/operated by EPay Inc. Corporation or its affiliates. These Third-Party Websites maintain independent privacy/data collection practices and legal policies. EPay Inc. assumes no responsibility for Third-Party Website content and makes no representations regarding its accuracy.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This policy applies to all personal information you submit while using products and services provided by EPAY, including but not limited to information submitted through the website, mobile application, API, admin console, or other product channels.

s1.title: 1. Scope of Application
s1.desc: This policy applies to all personal information you submit while using products and services provided by EPAY, including but not limited to information submitted through the website, mobile application, API, admin console, or other product channels.

s2.title: 2. Types of Information We Collect
s2.desc: During your use of the EPAY platform, we may collect the following types of information:
items: Identity information: Includes full name, date of birth, ID documents, address, used for KYC and compliance reviews.
Contact information: Such as phone number and email address.
Account and transaction information: Including wallet address, transaction records, hashes, and order numbers.
Usage behavior and device information: Such as login IP, browser fingerprint, device type, and access logs.
Risk control and security information: Including behavioral identification and system risk labels.

s3.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
items: Account registration, identity verification, payment processing, and risk control.
Fulfilling regulatory obligations such as KYC and AML reviews.
Providing service notifications, transaction alerts, and security warnings.
System maintenance, data analysis, and product improvement.
Partner service integration (e.g., verification providers).

s4.title: 4. Use of Cookies
s4.desc: EPAY uses Cookies and similar technologies to enhance user experience, including:
items: Remembering login status.
User behavior analysis and product optimization.
Providing interfaces and recommendations aligned with user preferences.
s4.footer: You may disable Cookies through your browser settings, but some features may be limited as a result.

s5.title: 5. How We Share and Disclose
s5.desc: We do not sell user data and only share it in the following scenarios:
items: With service providers (e.g., KYC verification, payment gateways).
To comply with lawful requests from law enforcement or regulatory authorities.
Internal compliance sharing within EPAY affiliated entities.

s6.title: 6. Data Storage and Security
s6.desc: We implement the following security measures to protect your information:
items: HTTPS encryption for all data transmission.
Encrypted storage of user information.
Multi-factor authentication and access control.
Cold and hot wallet separation with asset monitoring.
Regular vulnerability scanning and security testing.

s7.title: 7. Your Rights
s7.desc: You may exercise the following rights at any time:
items: Right to access and query your data.
Right to rectify and supplement missing information.
Right to deletion (subject to legal conditions).
Right to restrict processing and withdraw consent.
Right to data portability and transfer.

s8.title: 8. Protection of Minors
s8.desc: This platform is not intended for minors under the age of 18. If we discover a minor’s account, we will take immediate action to cancel and delete the associated information.

s9.title: 9. Cross-Border Data Transfer
s9.desc: Some of EPAY‘s services are deployed overseas. When cross-border data transfers are involved, we will comply with relevant laws and sign data protection agreements to ensure secure transmission.

s10.title: 10. Policy Change Notification
s10.desc: If there are significant changes to this policy, we will notify you in advance via website announcement, email, or in-app notification.
